executive_summary: Build failure analysis for scib_demo repository on main branch. The build process failed at the workflow dispatch stage due to a missing or inaccessible GitHub Actions workflow file. This is a critical configuration error that prevents any build execution from occurring. The workflow file '.github/workflows/build.yml' could not be found or accessed, resulting in HTTP 404 errors across all 3 build attempts.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found error when attempting to trigger the build workflow. The workflow file '.github/workflows/build.yml' does not exist in the repository or is not accessible with the current permissions.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file '.github/workflows/build.yml' is missing from the repository, or the GitHub token lacks sufficient permissions to access/trigger the workflow, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation for the repository.

errors.title: Repeated Workflow Dispatch Failures
errors.description: The workflow dispatch failed consistently across 3 consecutive attempts (attempt-1, attempt-2, attempt-3), indicating a persistent configuration issue rather than a transient error.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure (attempt 3 of 3)
errors.root_cause: Persistent absence of the required workflow file or continuous permission/access issues preventing workflow execution.
errors.impact: Build automation is completely non-functional. Manual intervention required to resolve the configuration issue before any automated builds can proceed.

recommended_fixes.title: Create Missing GitHub Actions Workflow File
recommended_fixes.description: Create the required '.github/workflows/build.yml' file with a standard Maven build configuration.
recommended_fixes.implementation: Use GitHub Feature Branch Script Committer to create the workflow file with Maven build steps including checkout, Java setup, Maven build, and test execution.
recommended_fixes.validation: Verify workflow file exists at '.github/workflows/build.yml' and can be triggered via workflow dispatch API.

recommended_fixes.title: Verify GitHub Token Permissions
recommended_fixes.description: Ensure the GitHub token has 'workflow' and 'actions:write' permissions to dispatch workflows.
recommended_fixes.implementation: Check token scopes in GitHub settings and regenerate token with required permissions if needed.
recommended_fixes.validation: Test workflow dispatch API call returns HTTP 204 (success) instead of 404.

recommended_fixes.title: Enable GitHub Actions for Repository
recommended_fixes.description: Verify GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings and not disabled by organization policies.
recommended_fixes.implementation: Check repository settings > Actions > General and ensure Actions are enabled.
recommended_fixes.validation: Confirm Actions tab is visible in repository and workflows can be created.

violations.description: Repository lacks functional CI/CD pipeline due to missing workflow configuration.
No automated build process configured for Maven-based Java project.

recommendations: Implement standard GitHub Actions workflow for Maven builds
Configure branch protection rules requiring successful builds
Set up automated testing and code quality checks
Enable workflow status badges in README

analysis_metadata.api_call_note: No GitHub Actions run available to fetch logs from - workflow dispatch failed before run creation
